response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:52: Vocal performance identified. Song lyrics 'Believe me, let it go...' identified. Search revealed it's from the hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary concert 'Chromatic Future'. Song identified as 'Chromatic Future' (original song). 2. 00:52-01:08: Event outro/outro card. No vocals. 3. Lyrics were transcribed from the video itself.
response.global_summary: The video captures a live musical performance by Hololive Indonesia VTubers at their 5th Anniversary concert, 'Chromatic Future'. The segment includes the group performing an original song, 'Chromatic Future', followed by an outro.

scenes.description: Hololive Indonesia VTubers perform the original song 'Chromatic Future' on stage with a backdrop of colorful lights and concert visuals.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Everything was easy. I did it all alone. 
So effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold. 
Got all problems. 
So without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled. 
There's no way I can begin. 
Dream life that I need to win. 
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces. 
I know I got to s a little higher. 
Hope all turns to be the things I desire. 
Layaknya burung merak yang bersayap kan ku taklukkan gelap. 
Dengan sihir angin kan kuajak semua yang terlelap untuk bangkit melawan dunia. 
We never give up as long as we got the strength in ourselves. 
We could rise above the pain. 
We stronger than that. 
Walking step by step trusting my own face giving me what I deserve to have. 
Let's go. 
Believe me. 
Let it go. 
Believe me. 
It'll never bring down. 
Believe me. 
Let it go. 
It'll never bring us down. 
Believe me. 
Don't let their cruelty still my royalty. 
And when the universe works against me, I will just let it go. 
Let it go.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everything was easy. I did it all alone. 
So effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold. 
Got all problems. 
So without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled. 
There's no way I can begin. 
Dream life that I need to win. 
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces. 
I know I got to s a little higher. 
Hope all turns to be the things I desire. 
Like a peafowl that has wings, I will conquer the darkness. 
With the magic of the wind, I will invite everyone who is asleep to rise and fight the world. 
We never give up as long as we got the strength in ourselves. 
We could rise above the pain. 
We stronger than that. 
Walking step by step trusting my own face giving me what I deserve to have. 
Let's go. 
Believe me. 
Let it go. 
Believe me. 
It'll never bring down. 
Believe me. 
Let it go. 
It'll never bring us down. 
Believe me. 
Don't let their cruelty still my royalty. 
And when the universe works against me, I will just let it go. 
Let it go.

scenes.description: The performance concludes and the video transitions to the event's promotional outro graphic with text.
